revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia7]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia7]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia07]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia07]] to [[Category:dd]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia07]] to [[Category:dd]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia07]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] doing this to split off the two wikipedia derived categories using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
bumping all wikipedia articles part 2, not sure if this is necessary
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia 2]] to [[Category:kk]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 2]] to [[Category:qq]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 2]] to [[Category:qq-{{subst:NAMESPACE}}-qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Help:Page histories]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Help:Page histories]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Wikipedia overwrites]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Wikipedia overwrites
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Help:Page histories]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Help:Page histories]]</includeonly> <noinclude></noinclude>

revision.comment: removing these dumb broken links that cause problems
